name: Harmine
summary: Harmine entry from SciSpace evidence pass. Evidence level: low.
description: Harmine is cataloged as beta-carboline alkaloid. Reported mechanisms: reversible MAO-A inhibition; monoamine elevation; BDNF/neurogenesis signaling preclinical.
contraindications: serotonin toxicity risk with interacting drugs
conditions: not enough human evidence for a consumer recommendation
buying_criteria: Do not promote as a general consumer product
keep as research/reference unless human supplement evidence and safety context are added
